fennel-rubbed-leg-of-lamb-with-salsa-ver.name: Fennel-rubbed Leg Of Lamb With Salsa Verde

ingredients.item: Small or medium carrots with tops
A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Season lamb generously with salt and pepper; let it sit out at room temperature while you prepare the rub.

Using spice mill or mortar and pestle, coarsely grind fennel seeds and red pepper flakes. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in garlic and 3 Tbsp. oil. Evenly rub lamb all over with spice mixture, making sure to work it into every nook and cranny.

Preheat oven to 300°. Heat remaining ¼ cup oil in a large heavy skillet over medium. As soon as oil is hot and shimmering, add lamb to skillet and cook, carefully pouring off fat as needed into a small bowl (reserve it), until golden brown all over, 3–5 minutes per side. The goal here is to cook out some of the excess fat while you brown the meat, so it’s important to maintain a moderate heat to keep the meat from getting dark before the fat can melt out. If the oil looks really dark or tastes burned, discard it and use olive oil in the next step.

Trim tops from carrots and set aside for making the salsa verde. Scrub carrots, pat dry, and scatter along the outer edges of a large rimmed baking sheet. Place seared lamb in the center. Pour reserved fat and any fat still in skillet (don’t forget to scrape out the crispy bits stuck to the bottom of the pan) over carrots, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat.

Roast lamb and carrots until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of leg registers 135° for medium-rare, 75–90 minutes. Transfer lamb to a cutting board and tent with foil; let rest 20 minutes. Leave oven on.

While the lamb is resting, transfer carrots to a platter, then carefully pour any juices from the baking sheet into a small bowl (you should have about ¼ cup; if you don’t, top off with olive oil). Transfer carrots back to baking sheet and pop back into oven. Roast 5 minutes to reheat.

Meanwhile, finely chop reserved carrot tops to make ½ cup; discard remaining tops. Place in a small bowl and mix in parsley, chives, lemon juice, pan juices, and 2 Tbsp. oil. Season with salt and pepper and more lemon juice if needed.
Remove twine from lamb and slice about ½" thick (but you can really go as thick or thin as you would like). Arrange on a platter and serve with warm roasted carrots and salsa verde alongside.

fettuccine-with-shrimp-and-white-sauce-s.name: Fettuccine With Shrimp And White Sauce Step By Step
fettuccine-with-shrimp-and-white-sauce-s.original_name: Fettuccine con gambas y salsa blanca paso a paso

ingredients.item: 300 gramos de gambas peladas y desvenadas

instructions: Cooking the fetTuccines in a large pot with salt water, following the package's instructions. When they're at the dente, scrape them and save them.
While the dough is made, it heats the butter into a big frying pan with medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and spray till fragrant about 2 minutes.
Add the shrimp to the frying pan and cook till they become pink and opaque, about 3-4 minutes. If you like, press some lemon juice onto the shrimp to give them a fresh touch.
It reduces fire and pits milk cream into frying pan. Let them get hot, sometimes stirring, till they start bubbling. Add parmesan and mix well till melting and the salsa is soft and creamy.

Incorporates the cooked fettoccines into the frying pan and mixes everything well so that the dough gets impregnated with the sauce. If the salsa is very thick, you can add some of the cooking water to suit your taste.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto, y adorna con perejil fresco picado. Sirve inmediatamente y disfruta de esta delicia casera.

fetuccine-alfredo-with-shrimp-and-bacon-.name: Fetuccine Alfredo With Shrimp And Bacon
fetuccine-alfredo-with-shrimp-and-bacon-.original_name: Fetuccine Alfredo com camarão e bacon
instructions: Cook the dough in boiling water seasoned with salt for 10 minutes. Drain and reserve the water.

In a pot, add the oil and garlic peeled and chopped, take to the fire and stir. Then add the cut bacon to the strips and let cook. Add the shrimp kernel and let cook for five minutes, add the creams and parmesan and season with salt and pepper, letting cook another three minutes, always stirring.
Remove from the flame into a glass and wrap the dough. If necessary, add some baking water. Serve on a plate or a platter, sprinkled with chopped chives.

fish-and-chips-with-minty-mushy-peas.name: Fish And Chips With Minty Mushy Peas

ingredients.item: Shelled fresh peas (from about 2 pounds pods) or 10 ounces frozen peas
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground white or black pepper

instructions: Heat butter in a small saucepan over medium. Cook onion, stirring occasionally, until softened but not browned, about 5 minutes. Add peas and stock and season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer until peas are bright green and tender, about 5 minutes.
Transfer to a food processor, add mint, and pulse to a coarse puree; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Peas can be cooked 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

Fit a large pot with thermometer; pour in oil to measure 4". Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 250°. Add half of potatoes and fry, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are tender and cooked through but have not taken on any color, 10–12 minutes. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer to paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining potatoes.

Increase heat to bring oil to 325°. Whisk beer, soy sauce, cayenne, and 1½ cups flour in a large bowl until no lumps remain; season with salt and pepper. Place remaining ½ cup flour in a shallow bowl. Season haddock with salt and pepper and dredge lightly in flour.

Working with 2 pieces at a time, dip fish into batter, letting excess drip back into bowl. Carefully lower fish into oil and fry until fish is cooked through and batter is golden brown and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Transfer fish to paper towels to drain; season with salt.
As soon as all fish is fried, add potatoes to oil and fry until crisp and golden, about 4 minutes. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer chips to paper towels to drain; season with salt.
Meanwhile, gently reheat mushy peas over medium heat, if needed. Serve alongside fish and chips.

french-onion-dip.name: French Onion Dip
instructions: Heat oil in a small skillet over medium. Cook onion, garlic, and thyme, stirring occasionally, until onion is deep golden brown and very soft, 35–40 minutes. Discard thyme and let cool.
Mix caramelized onions, shallot, sour cream, chives, and lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Let sit 30 minutes to let flavors meld. Serve with potato chips for dipping.
Do Ahead: Dip can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

french-puff-pastry-tart-with-pears-and-c.name: French Puff Pastry Tart With Pears And Chocolate
instructions: Line a tart pan with parchment paper. Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine butter and 1/2 cup plus 2 tablespoons sugar in a large bowl; beat using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Mix in almond flour. Add eggs 1 at a time and mix until well combined.
Line a tart pan with the puff pastry and prick with a fork all over.

Place chocolate in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir frequently, scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching, until melted, about 5 minutes. Cool slightly. Cover puff pastry with melted chocolate.
Carefully pour egg mixture on top of the chocolate on the puff pastry without mixing the 2 layers. Arrange pear slices on top of the tart.
Bake in the preheated oven until pastry has puffed up and is golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes.

french-toast-in-thermomix-pequerecetas.name: French Toast In Thermomix

ingredients.item: 1 bar of bread from the previous day (or special bars for calves)
Pig of a lemon or an orange (with no white part to avoid bitterness)

instructions: He starts with his milk with his lemon skin and cinnamon. To this end, it activates the thermomix balance, adds a liter of milk, 150 grams of sugar, lemon skin and cinnamon. Programme 9 minutes to 90 degrees with inverse turn at spoonspeed. Once the infusion's complete, let the milk cool for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, cut the calves bread into slices and prepare clear film squares the size of each slice.
Summer the slice of bread into the infuded milk and make sure that they are not soaked up so that they do not break up and have little to dry.
Bate los dos huevos en la Thermomix durante 10 segundos a velocidad 5 y pasa las rebanadas por el huevo batido.
Coloca cada rebanada en un cuadradito de film transparente untado con un poco de mantequilla derretida.
Prepare the thermomix for steamed cooking by adding 750 grams of water and by planning 25 minutes at a temperature Varoma at Speed 1. Put the cuts wrapped with Varoma and wait 25 minutes.
Once steamed, pass the calves through a mixture of sugar and cinnamon, or bathe them in calves syrup.

fresh-tomato-pizza-sauce.name: Fresh Tomato Pizza Sauce

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Pulse tomatoes, anchovies, garlic, oil, and basil in a food processor or blender until mostly smooth (some texture is okay); season with salt and pepper.

instructions: Heat half the olive oil in the pan and leave the opinions on medium heat to become transparent, without color.
Salt them lightly and add the bay leaf.
Leave them for about 10'-12' to blonde and soften.
We put them on a platter.
Cut the liver into think slides and then into long pieces.
Heat the remaining olive oil in the pan over high heat.
Sprinkle the pieces with some flour and generally shake the exces flour.
Add the tamponized with flower pieces to the olive oil.
Make sure to get color around, for about 3 minutes.
Add the onions back to the pan and sauce for 1 minute, stirring.
Add the wine and let already all the liquid Evaporate and the food with its oil remain.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley.

Since the calf liver in the pan is an excellent source of protein and especially rich in iron, that is why it must be in our diet. Its cooking must be done with care to have the most delicate effect.

fried-potatoes-recipe-comedera.name: Fried Potatoes Recipe
instructions: Limpia y pela las papas y ponlas enteras, o picadas por la mitad, en una olla con agua.
It's common that in many cases potatoes aren't completely stuffed but have some skin and some without skin, this is optional.
Once the potatoes are cooked remove them from the fire.
Mientras se van cocinando las papas puedes hacer la salsa.
He pits his tomato into small cubes.
The onions stalks will also be minced into small pieces.
Warm up a frying pan with medium heat and put his butter and put his onions out. Do it for a few minutes.
Agrega el tomate y las especias: sal, pimienta y comino al gusto.
Mezcla bien y deja que se cocine unos 5 minutos.
Now add milk cream and grated cheese and keep stirring a few more minutes.
Pon las papas en un plato profundo y echa por encima la salsa.

Listo, ya tienes unas deliciosas papas chorreadas.

fried-prawns-in-soy-sauce.name: Fried Prawns In Soy Sauce
instructions: Heat 5 tablespoons oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add prawns; saute until pink, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Pour remaining 2 tablespoons oil into the wok. Add spring onions and ginger; cook and stir until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Return prawns to the wok; cook and stir for 1 minute. Add chicken stock, sugar, rice wine, soy sauce, bouillon granules, and salt; bring sauce to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer until flavors combine, about 2 minutes.
Arrange prawns on a serving plate; pour sauce on top.

frozen-kumquat-and-chile-mignonette.name: Frozen Kumquat And Chile Mignonette
instructions: Bring sugar and 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Add kumquats and chile and cook until kumquats and chile are soft, about 3 minutes; drain kumquats and chile.
Purée kumquats, chile, vinegar, and 1/2 cup water in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl, pressing on solids. Mix in salt.

Transfer mixture to a loaf pan and freeze 1 hour. Scrape mixture with a fork to break up frozen portions. Freeze, scraping and breaking up mixture every 30 minutes, until it resembles fluffy shaved ice, 2–4 hours.
DO AHEAD: Granita can be made 5 days ahead. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and keep frozen. Scrape before serving. (Serve alongside oysters.)

Break the eggs in a bowl.

Bake the fruit salads in a preheated evening at 180°C and for about 15 minutes.
When the men's fruit is inflamed and stabilized, she's ready.
Turn it over into cutting wood and cut it into 6 triangle pieces.

furikake-snack-mix.name: Furikake Snack Mix

ingredients.prep: seasoned seaweed and sesame rice topping

instructions: Preheat oven to 107°C (110 degrees C).

Melt the butter and sugar together in a small sauce pan over low heat. Remove from heat, then stir in the corn oil and corn syrup. Place the cereal on a large baking sheet. Pour the butter mixture over the cereal, then sprinkle the furikake while tossing the cereal to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven until the cereal is dry, stirring every 15 minutes to keep cereal from browning too quickly. Allow to cool, then store in an airtight container.
